idea: Kubernetes deployment for a release catalog API
why_this_project_matters: This project introduces the core Kubernetes objects used in everyday platform work: Deployment, Service, and ConfigMap.
architecture: A single Deployment runs multiple replicas of a release catalog container. A ConfigMap injects environment values and a ClusterIP Service exposes the application inside the cluster. Liveness and readiness probes keep traffic away from unhealthy pods.
steps: Apply the ConfigMap, Deployment, and Service manifests in order.
Wait for all pods to become ready and confirm the probes pass.
Use kubectl port-forward or an ingress controller to access the service.
Scale the deployment and observe replica scheduling behavior.
Add ingress, autoscaling, and policy controls once the basics are stable.
